Q2.query: Show the station names and available bikes for stations with more than 5 available bikes at '2015-06-02 14:00:00'.
Q2.sql: SELECT station_name, bikes_available FROM status WHERE bikes_available > '5' AND time LIKE '2015-06-02 14:%';

Q8.query: Find the names of stations that had at least 10 bikes available at any point in time and are located in 'San Jose'.
Q8.sql: SELECT DISTINCT s.name FROM station s JOIN status st ON s.name = st.station_name WHERE st.bikes_available >= '10' AND s.city = 'San Jose';

Q11.query: Find the stations where the number of bikes available is greater than 5 and the number of docks available is less than 10. List station name and time.
Q11.sql: SELECT station_name, time FROM status WHERE bikes_available > '5' AND docks_available < '10';
